**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yue'ao Auto Parts Co., Ltd. is an absurd classification error specimen of a 'car factory in a residential community.' The underlying preset Apple Inc. multi-million-level export OEM hallucination has been thoroughly shattered by the engine. The official commercial system, simply because its name contains 'Auto Parts,' crudely triggered the highest level of heavy industry tag, categorizing it under 'Automobile Manufacturing - Complete Automobile Manufacturing.' However, the forensic probe directly aligned its true physical and financial parameters: this is an old shop established in 2010, with a paid-in capital of a mere 510,000 RMB, and a 2024 insured headcount of only '1 person.' The most fatal evidence lies in its geographical coordinates: 'Building 51, Xianhe Mingyuan, No. 52 Heming Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' 'Xianhe Mingyuan' is a highly typical large residential community in Nanjing. Downstairs of Building 51 in a residential community (highly likely a street-facing ground-floor shop or garage), employing 1 worker and using 500,000 RMB to set up stamping, welding, and final assembly lines to manufacture 'complete automobiles'? This is not only an ultimate mockery of industrial common sense, but even the community property management wouldn't allow it. Examining its extremely honest business license, the entire text only contains 'sales,' without any boastful 'manufacturing' words. The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is fundamentally not an automobile manufacturing plant; this is a typical Micro Auto Parts Shop (a single-person micro retail store for auto parts and lubricants) opened downstairs (or nearby) in a residential community.
